patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 validated 6+ times: market negative edge reliably outperforms even triple F-signal conviction stacks (MIL@CHC 5/18, F1+F2+F3, CHC lost 9-3). Never relax regardless of F-signal strength.
D-grade SKIP picks with BOTH SP edge AND PQI against model direction are directionally unreliable — confirmed in 5/18 postgame (OAK@LAA, LAD@SD); note the warning but SKIP stays.
4-condition OVERRIDE rule validated 4/4: today CHW@SEA fails condition 1 (f5_full_delta=0.0372, not >0.20) despite historical matchup context — no override without all four conditions.
F3-alone without F1/F2 backup AND SP edge against AND PQI against = directionally suspect (NYM@WSH 5/18: F3=2908, WSH lost 16-7); today PIT@STL and ATL@MIA fit this pattern.

CIN @ PHI.reasoning: HARD CAP 6 fired correctly: edge=+39.62pp exceeds the +25pp calibration hallucination floor — validated 3-for-3 in archive. fair_prob=0.1065 is extreme; market prices PHI at only ~10.65% implied probability, far below the 0.42 floor, confirming a fundamental model misread. confidence_downgrade and bullpen_fatigue both stack as additional warnings. No qualitative context overrides HARD CAP 6.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 6 extreme positive edge hallucination — 3-for-3 validated
fair_prob 0.1065 far below 0.42 floor confirms market-model divergence

BAL @ TB.reasoning: Grade D (-1), no F-signals. f5_full_delta=0.2128: BAL wins F5 at 73.49% (BAL's SP dominates) but TB expected to win full game at 52.21% — full-game thesis depends entirely on TB's bullpen carrying the back half. odds_status=fetched_capped indicates restricted market pricing. Stage 1/2 disagreement exceeds Heuristic 5 threshold of 0.15. SKIP correctly applied given Stage 1/2 tension and no confirming signals.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta=0.2128 > 0.15 flags bullpen-carry dependence
D-grade no-F-signal SKIP is correct posture

HOU @ MIN.reasoning: MIN picked with F1_xera_gap=1.27* (small-sample asterisk) backed by PQI confirming MIN (Δ=+9.1) — HARD CAP 5 secondary-signal requirement met. Stage 1/2 agree tightly (Δ=0.03). Grade C because fair_prob missing (Odds API did not fire) — stake correctly zeroed pending market validation. On 5/18, MIN won 6-3 as home team in this same matchup. Direction is sound; stake withheld until market anchor available.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 5: F1* requires F2/F3/PQI backup — PQI at +9.1 satisfies
fair_prob missing correctly zeros stake (market validation required)
MIN 5/18 same matchup context: MIN won 6-3 as home team

TEX @ COL.reasoning: Grade D (-2): SP edge 0.79 xERA AGAINST COL (TEX SP is better) and PQI AGAINST (Δ=-9.0) — both primary signals oppose the model direction. confidence_downgrade=True and acute_roster stress warning stacked. Per 5/18 pattern: D-grade picks with both SP edge and PQI against pick direction are directionally unreliable. Coors park inflation adds further noise. SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: D-grade with SP edge + PQI both against pick direction = directionally unreliable (5/18 pattern)
acute_roster + confidence_downgrade stack correctly suppresses stake

SF @ ARI.reasoning: Grade D (-4), worst on slate. SP edge 3.77 xERA AGAINST ARI (SF SP vastly better) and PQI AGAINST (Δ=-21.0). Extreme f5_full_delta=0.3829: SF wins F5 at 71.45% via SP quality but ARI picked for full game. Considered 4-condition OVERRIDE to SF: f5_full_delta ✓, quality opposing SP ✓, but no stacked flags (confidence_downgrade=False) ✗ and fair_prob=0.5047 > 0.42 ✗. Two conditions fail. SKIP confirmed.
lessons_applied: 4-condition OVERRIDE requires ALL four — stacked-flags and fair_prob<0.42 both fail today
D-grade (-4) with SP and PQI both against is directionally suspect

CHW @ SEA.reasoning: CHW picked (away). fair_prob=0.4171 < 0.42 floor triggers SKIP. confidence_downgrade=True and bullpen_fatigue present. Despite the 5/18 CHW@SEA OVERRIDE (SEA won 6-1), today's f5_full_delta=0.0372 is tiny — CHW actually wins F5 at 57.05%, opposite of 5/18's structure. 4-condition OVERRIDE requires f5_full_delta > 0.20; today's 0.0372 fails condition 1 badly. SKIP confirmed.
lessons_applied: 4-condition OVERRIDE rule: f5_full_delta must exceed 0.20 — today's 0.0372 fails
fair_prob < 0.42 floor correctly triggers SKIP

ATL @ MIA.reasoning: MIA picked at home. Grade D (-2): SP edge 0.69 xERA AGAINST MIA (ATL's SP is better) and PQI AGAINST (Δ=-14.9) — both signals oppose model direction. confidence_downgrade=True and bullpen_fatigue stacked. ATL's elite lineup (Acuña, Olson, Albies) versus MIA's weaker order argues further against MIA. full_prob=0.5013 is a near-coin-flip; per 5/18 pattern, D-grade SKIP with both SP edge and PQI against direction is directionally unreliable.

full_prob=0.5013 near coin-flip with headwinds confirms SKIP

NYM @ WSH.reasoning: Zach Thornton has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — SP quality is entirely unquantifiable. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol validated 8+ times in the 2026 archive; zero-data starters are a hard stop regardless of lineup signals (WSH home batters: James Wood, CJ Abrams noted but insufficient without SP quality data). No pick issued.

PQI AGAINST NYY (Δ=-12.2). confidence_downgrade and bullpen_fatigue stacked. F2+F3 provide directional support for NYY but market, SP, and PQI all oppose staking.

SP edge against + PQI against + negative edge = no stake regardless of F-signal count

Direction sound; stake correctly zeroed by edge-band rule.
lessons_applied: Three-signal GOLD bar: SP agrees + F3 backup + PQI confirms direction

LAD @ SD.reasoning: LAD picked away. Strong F-signals: F1_xera_gap=3.72 (no asterisk) + F2_xwoba_gap=0.035. Pre-cap grade B+ (score 3). HARD CAP 1 fired: edge=-11.23pp demotes to B- (score 1), zeroing stake. fair_prob=0.6526 confirms market strongly backs LAD directionally (65.26% implied) but negative edge means staking at market odds is negative-EV relative to model's 54.03% estimate. f5_full_delta=0.1906 < 0.20 OVERRIDE threshold. HARD CAP 1 correctly prevents stake; LAD direction may be sound but market price is unfavorable.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1: negative edge prevents staking even with large F1+F2 signals
